title: Forecasting and Probability Limits Calculation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps involved in calculating forecasts and their associated probability limits from a fitted time series model.
relationships: Historical Data is used to Fit the Model
Fitted Model generates a Point Forecast
Model and residual analysis determine Forecast Error Variance
Error Variance and chosen Confidence Level (via Z-Score) are used to Calculate Probability Limits
Point Forecast and Limits are combined into the Final Forecast Interval
